nodes.label: Offline-First PWA Rationale
nodes.rationale: User wants offline-first play (PWA) with future game sync across devices - this drove the choice of vite-plugin-pwa on the client and a Postgres-backed API scaffold on the server for eventual sync.

nodes.label: Confidence Score Rubric
nodes.rationale: Discrete confidence buckets (0.95/0.85/0.75/0.65/0.55) are used instead of a continuous range because models collapse continuous guidance into a bimodal distribution (>50% at 0.5, >40% at 0.85+) - a fixed rubric is easier for models to follow correctly.

nodes.label: Share Link Design Decisions
nodes.rationale: Share = full game snapshot excluding the won flag; won games cannot be shared; links are multi-use with independent forks per recipient; no expiry/deletion/auth; 8-char base62 random ID chosen over sequential counters to avoid enumeration and keep implementation simple.

nodes.label: TweaksPanel design-tool scaffold
nodes.rationale: The prototype's useTweaks hook and TweaksPanel JSX are a design-tool overlay from the prototyping environment, not part of the shipping app - the underlying values (accent, theme, peers, selStyle, numFont) are real settings that should be ported as plain settings state instead of porting the panel itself.
